title: codereview-P2: ambiguous hash_32(EUI-64,0) signature in 02-physical-link.md:199
description: The note and pseudocode use hash_32(EUI-64,0) but 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:119 defines hash_32(data bytes, length). Clarify if 0 is seed, length (wrong for 8B EUI), or retry param. Cross-ref to link_ctx.c or schc for exact impl. Tag codereview. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-b6zw. Must fix before closing main bead. File 2 more for 3 passes.
